# Inbox Requirements Checklist: UC-19 Receive Notifications in a Built-in Inbox

**Purpose**: Validate UC-19 inbox notification requirements for clarity, completeness, consistency, and measurable review readiness
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: [spec.md](/home/thaia/ECE493Group19/specs/019-branch-built-in-inbox/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all three notification event categories named in the spec and acceptance artifacts? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK002 Are requirements defined for delivered, retried, and stored-for-later notification outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003 to FR-010]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Is "exact repeated upstream event" defined clearly enough to support objective deduplication rules? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK004 Is "shows notification status when status can be presented" specific enough to avoid inconsistent interpretation? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-010]
- [x] CHK005 Is the 24-hour retry window defined clearly enough to determine when retry handling ends? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Are inbox-viewing permissions consistent between the user stories, functional requirements, and UI contract? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-004a]
- [x] CHK007 Do stored-notification requirements align with the edge cases for restricted access and regained access? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008 to FR-010, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK008 Are the delivery-timeliness and concurrent-user requirements measurable enough to validate without implementation assumptions? [Measurability, Spec §NFR-001 to NFR-002, Spec §SC-004 to SC-005]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK009 Are requirements defined for recovery after repeated delivery failures, not just the first failed attempt? [Coverage, Spec §FR-006 to FR-007, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK010 Are auditability, accessibility, and terminology-consistency requirements each explicit enough to support independent review? [Coverage, Spec §NFR-003 to NFR-005]

## Notes

- Use this checklist to validate requirement quality, not implementation behavior.
- Keep findings tied to what is written in the spec, plan, or contract artifacts.
- Review result: 10 items passed, 0 items remain open.
